backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that manages solar installation leads stored in a Map, exposing methods to submit, delete, retrieve, and list all leads sorted by name.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the implementation of entrance and interactive animations (fade-in, pulse glow, shimmer, hover) for the BankFinanceBanner component using CSS keyframes and Tailwind utilities.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key details of each component, hook, and style file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark modes across background, foreground, border, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app, setting the page title to 'TRI-GITA SERVICES' and mounting the app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes all page sections in order, including Header, Hero, SchemeInfo, OdishaGuide, WhyChooseUs, WarrantyGuarantee, Services, InquiryForm, BankFinanceBanner, WhatsAppSection, Footer, and a FloatingWhatsAppButton.
frontend/src/components/BankFinanceBanne: Full-width promotional banner component with scroll-triggered fade+slide-up entrance via IntersectionObserver, a shimmer overlay, a pulsing glow on the 90% stat, and a hover scale+glow WhatsApp CTA button, all with prefers-reduced-motion support.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Empty contact section component file with no content currently defined.
frontend/src/components/FloatingWhatsApp: Fixed floating WhatsApp button component in the bottom-right corner with a tooltip, linking to the business WhatsApp number with hover scale animation.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Two-column footer displaying brand identity, company description, business hours, and contact details (phone, email, address) with amber/charcoal color tokens and a caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with logo, smooth-scroll nav links, a phone call link, a WhatsApp CTA button, and a responsive hamburger menu for mobile.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-viewport hero section with a background solar image, headline, tagline, and CTA buttons linking to WhatsApp and the inquiry form section.
frontend/src/components/InquiryForm.tsx: Lead capture form that collects name, phone, email, city, system size, and message, validates inputs, then opens a pre-filled WhatsApp message to the business number.
frontend/src/components/OdishaGuide.tsx: Step-by-step guide section for applying to PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana in Odisha, covering registration, vendor selection, installation, and subsidy disbursement with subsidy tier tables and eligibility/document lists.
frontend/src/components/SchemeInfo.tsx: Informational section explaining the PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana scheme, listing key benefits, eligibility criteria, and a four-step process from consultation to subsidy receipt.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Renders a 'Services' section with two cards (Domestic and Commercial solar installation), each showing an image, feature list, and a CTA button that smooth-scrolls to the contact section.
frontend/src/components/WarrantyGuarante: Displays a dark-themed 'Warranty & Guarantee' section with three cards covering 25-year panel, 10-year inverter, and 5-year free service warranties.
Renders a CTA section prompting users to contact solar experts via WhatsApp, featuring a styled card with a direct link to the business WhatsApp number.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseUs.tsx: Displays a 'Why Choose Us' section with three benefit cards (Registered Vendor, Technical Expertise, Hassle-Free Process) highlighting the company's advantages.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a `useSubmitLead` mutation hook that calls the backend actor's `submitLead` method and invalidates the 'leads' query cache on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes using OKLCH colors, and declares utility classes and keyframe animations (e.g., banner-shimmer) for the app.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color palettes (solar, charcoal, and semantic tokens), custom fonts (Montserrat, Inter), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, existing features, and pending feature requests — currently noting a pending animation enhancement for the BankFinanceBanner component.
